query_normalized: predicting molecular properties from open babel fingerprints with random forests chemistry
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it is a comprehensive survey of the broader domain of "molecular property prediction," satisfying criterion (d) as a foundational reference for the field and criterion (f) by covering the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster (modern AI/ML methods) for the user's specific task of predicting properties from molecular representations.
